title: hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. exaltatum
intro: Hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. exaltatum is a subspecies of the Hedysarum hedysaroides plant, commonly known as the exalted hedysarum, which is a type of flowering legume. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Hedysarum hedysaroides subsp. exaltatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
